songs.title: Look Ma No Brains!
feed: “Look Ma No Brains!” by Green Day reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Look Ma No Brains!” by Green Day reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 41 spots to #1.
“Look Ma No Brains!” by Green Day climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 41 spots to #1.
“Look Ma No Brains!” by Green Day is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 165 sales units.
“Look Ma No Brains!” by Green Day is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 550 streams units.
“Look Ma No Brains!” by Green Day is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 68 airplay units.
“Look Ma No Brains!” by Green Day is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 818,559 total units.
